summary: Final implementation covers session cleanup cron job, config versioning, and review request rate limiting. All changes staged, ready for commit and push.
details: Files modified: src/config.ts (adds versioning validation), src/escalation-server.ts (improved error/failure handling with retry), src/mcp-server.ts (rate limiting logic), src/session-manager.ts (automatic session cleanup and cron logic).
